scripts.build: yarn workspace @orderiq/types build && yarn workspace @orderiq/backend build && yarn workspace @orderiq/frontend build
scripts.backend:dev: yarn workspace @orderiq/types build && yarn workspace @orderiq/backend dev
scripts.lint: yarn workspace @orderiq/backend lint && yarn workspace @orderiq/frontend lint
scripts.ci: yarn lint && yarn format:check && yarn build
scripts.format: yarn workspace @orderiq/backend format && yarn workspace @orderiq/frontend format
